queries.question: What diets do all the nutritionists cover together?
queries.sql: SELECT Diets.diet_type_value  from Nutritionists_Diets join Diets on Nutritionists_Diets.diet_type_id = Diets.diet_type_id join Nutritionists on Nutritionists_Diets.nutritionist_id = Nutritionists.nutritionist_id   GROUP BY Nutritionists_Diets.diet_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Nutritionists_Diets.nutritionist_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Nutritionists)

queries.question: Show me the diets that every nutritionist covers.
queries.sql: select nutritionists.email , diets.diet_type_value from Nutritionists_Diets join Diets on Nutritionists_Diets.diet_type_id = Diets.diet_type_id join Nutritionists on Nutritionists_Diets.nutritionist_id = Nutritionists.nutritionist_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?email ?diet_type_value WHERE {
  ?nutritionists_diets a :Nutritionists_Diets .
  ?diets a :Diets .
  ?nutritionists_diets p:hasDiets ?diets .
  ?nutritionists a :Nutritionists .
  ?nutritionists_diets p:hasNutritionists ?nutritionists .
  ?nutritionists p:email ?email .
  ?diets p:diet_type_value ?diet_type_value .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the diets that every nutritionist covers.
